MaskMe
  • Welcome to MaskMe
  • View page source

Welcome to MaskMe

MaskMe is a modular framework for data anonymization. It provides a robust set of tools to transform sensitive information while preserving the analytical value of your datasets.

Overview

MaskMe is designed for data engineers and privacy researchers who need to:

  • Apply consistent anonymization strategies across different data formats.

  • Maintain statistical integrity for machine learning and analytics.

  • Comply with data protection regulations through verifiable transformations.

  • Extend functionality with domain-specific privacy logic.
